name: Emiway Bantai
description:
'''Bilal Shaikh''' (born 13 November 1995), known professionally as '''Emiway Bantai''', is an [[Indian rap|Indian rapper]] from [[Mumbai]], [[Maharashtra]]. The name Emiway combines "Emi" from [[Eminem]] and "Way" from [[Lil Wayne]], while Bantai is Mumbai street-slang meaning "brother" or "dude".

A prominent figure in the [[desi hip-hop]] community, Emiway has made songs in [[Hindi]], [[English language|English]], and [[Marathi language|Marathi]]. Emiway gained prominence with his 2014 debut single "Aur Bantai" and was featured in the 2019 [[Bollywood]] film ''[[Gully Boy]]'' as himself, contributing to the song "Asli Hip Hop" from the soundtrack.
